The UK stands ready 24/7 to defend itself," a government spokesperson said.

items.original_title: Trump stuns Saudis by pinning nuclear deal to Israel ties
items.rss_summary:
US President Donald Trump said Thursday that a nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia depends on the kingdom recognizing Israel -- throwing the agreement into turmoil just the day after it was signed.
The White House insisted that the Saudis knew the deal was contingent on recognizing Israel, despite the fact that it was not mentioned when the deal was announced.

items.original_title: US Senate blocks resolution curbing Trump's Iran war powers
items.rss_summary: WASHINGTON, July 23 (Reuters) - The U.S. Senate on Thursday blocked a Democratic-led resolution aiming to stop the Iran war until hostilities are authorized by Congress. The resolution reflects growing congressional concern, even among President Donald Trump's Republicans, over the war.The Senate voted 49 to 47 not to advance the war powers resolution. (Reporting by Patricia Zengerle; Editing by Don Durfee)

items.title: Я благодарен Европейскому Союзу и каждому европейскому лидеру за принятие 21-го пакета санкций против России. Очень важно, чтобы давление на Россию из-за войны, которую она начала – и отказывается закончить, – продолжается. Этот пакет включает в себя решительные меры по ограничению доходов России, включая предложения Украины, которые были приняты во внимание. Крайне важно сохранить наше единство и продолжать это давление. Мы ожидаем, что работа над 22-м пакетом санкций будет активно продвигаться вперед, и надеемся, что он введет дополнительные ограничения, которые будут способствовать миру и еще больше ограничит способность России вести войну. Спасибо, Европейский Союз!
items.original_title: I am grateful to the European Union and to every European leader for adopting the 21st sanctions package against Russia. It is very important that pressure on Russia over the war it started – and refuses to end – continues. This package includes strong measures to curb Russia's revenues, including Ukrainian proposals that have been taken into account. It is crucial to preserve our unity and keep up this pressure. We expect work on the 22nd sanctions package to move forward actively and hope it will deliver additional restrictions that will advance peace and further limit Russia's ability to sustain its war. Thank you, European Union!

items.original_title: Exclusive: Trump "close" to decision on "massive attack" on Iran
items.rss_summary: President Trump told Axios on Thursday that he is seriously considering restarting major combat operations in Iran — including strikes that would be bigger than the ones carried out during "Operation Epic Fury." Why it matters: In a brief interview, Trump acknowledged that such a decision would have consequences and stressed he hasn't made a determination yet. Trump didn't give a deadline for his decision. Two other U.S. officials confirmed no call has been made and no new orders have been given
